name: 06 — Daily Approval Digest (Scheduled)
_comment: ARCHITECTURE NOTE: n8n orchestrates only. Scoring, classification, and digest generation happen in Netlify Functions. n8n just calls /digest with the appropriate type. Set SITE_URL env var in n8n to your deployed Netlify URL. No DISCOVERY_SECRET needed for digest calls.

parameters.jsCode:
// Log: no pending approvals today
return [{ json: { message: 'No pending approvals today.', skipped: true } }];

_setup.notes: Connect 'Format Digest Message' to a Slack, email, or webhook node to deliver the digest. No DISCOVERY_SECRET needed — digest endpoint is public (read-only summary data).
